body.body: Add LRU/dict cache in cortex for id IN batch fetches. Genesis nodes (ROOT, CP*, ID*) cached permanently — immutable. All others TTL=60s. Cache checked before every id IN fetch. Eliminates redundant double-fetches within same turn. See #258. Do T-cortex-258 (SELECT * fix) first — they touch the same code path.
body.title: Add in-process memory fetch cache to cortex (#258 part 2)
body.result: cortex.py: added _mem_cache dict + _cache_get/_cache_put/_cache_fetch_ids helpers; patched all 5 id IN batch fetch sites (search neighbor, BFS per-hop, BFS final, get_meaning_to_me, interpretive_traverse) — genesis types (ROOT/CORE_PATTERN/IDENTITY) cached permanently; others TTL=60s. Syntax OK.
